englishDefinitions: An imitation of the sound of a cash register, used to suggest money being made or a successful sale.
persianTranslation: صدای صندوق پول؛ یعنی پول درآوردن
examples: We sold the last ticket, and cha ching, the event was a success.
New customers mean more sales and, cha ching, more profit.
He joked, 'Cha ching!' when his online store got another order.
